summary_en: Orion Breweries acquired 393,700 shares (¥455.5M) via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-19 to enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results for Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Matching Trade (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
Orion Breweries announced the completion of a treasury stock acquisition on May 19, 2026. The company purchased 393,700 ordinary shares at a total cost of ¥455,510,900 via ToSTNeT-3 (Tokyo Stock Exchange off-hours matching trade system). This represented 0.92% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock.

The buyback was authorized under a resolution dated May 14, 2026, which set a maximum acquisition limit of 425,000 shares and ¥550 million. The stated rationale was to optimize shareholder returns and enhance capital efficiency, based on a comprehensive assessment of equity ratio levels and business outlook.

The transaction was executed on a single day (May 19, 2026) using the ToSTNeT-3 facility, which allows purchases outside regular exchange trading hours.
